title: Anne and Grea
overview: Anne and Grea are chitchatting during school breakfast, when an incident in the library forces Anne to leave her and try to fix it.

title: Agony of Grea
overview: Grea is suddenly struck with a high fever and Anne goes through the "forbidden" archives of the library trying to find a way to cure her.

title: Princess’s Holiday
overview: Anne and Grea spend the day shopping in town.

title: Test Time
overview: It is exam time at the school, and with everyone studying, Anne does not get to spend a lot of time with Grea.

title: Academy Down
overview: Monsters suddenly attack the school from within, and Anne sneaks in to find and rescue Grea.

title: Floating at Sea
overview: While the rest of the class is having fun at the beach, Anne and Grea go on their own private adventure.

title: Hide-and-Seek
overview: Anne and Grea are on library duty and, in order to pass the time, they decide to play a game of hide-and-seek.

title: Backstage Confidential
overview: When stage fright gets the better of Grea, it’s up to Anne to calm her down and save the school play. The show must go on!

title: A Slice of Life
overview: A simple misunderstanding opens a rift in Anne and Grea’s friendship. Will they be able to overcome this hurdle, or will it derail their relationship entirely?

title: The Pair's Promise
overview: It’s the end of the school term, and everyone is heading home. Parting is such sweet sorrow — especially for Grea and Anne.
